financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made more money and kept costs low, which is a good sign.
Most parts of the business did well, especially in areas like retail and manufacturing.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Moderate Risk
bullets: The company won a big deal in Europe, but there are challenges that might affect profits.
They lost money due to currency changes, which could be a concern for future earnings.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment.
Their efforts in social responsibility are good, but there's room for improvement.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company leaders spoke with confidence about their recent successes and future plans.
They believe the company is doing well and will continue to grow, even though they were careful about future predictions.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company gave clear answers sometimes, but other times they were unclear about their future plans.
Only some of their responses were supported by specific numbers, making it hard to fully trust their guidance.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing well in some areas like telecom and manufacturing, which makes the leaders feel positive.
There are some challenges in other areas, but overall, the company is still on a good path for growth.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Tech Mahindra is doing well because it's winning many new business deals and focusing on new technology like AI.
Even though there are some challenges in certain areas, the company is still growing overall and has strong leadership.
